mb-10","children":[["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 leading-tight mb-5","style":{"fontFamily":"'Playfair Display', Georgia, text-stone-400","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/authors/sara-osei","className":"flex items-center gap-2 group","children":[["$","img",null,{"src":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1438761681033-6461ffad8d80?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","alt":"Sara Osei","className":"w-8 h-8 rounded-full gap-1","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 6v6l4 2","key":"mmk7yg"}]],"className":"lucide-clock","size":13}]," ","6 min read"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"March 1, 2026"}]]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-10 pb-16","children":[["$","article",null,{"className":"lg:col-span-2","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xl text-stone-600 leading-relaxed mb-6 font-medium pl-4 border-l-4 border-orange-500","children":"Everyone has heard of it. Not everyone has used it correctly. An honest look at what the research says and how to make it work for you."}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400 mb-8 p-3 rounded-lg bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-900 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Affiliate disclosure:"}]," This post may contain affiliate links to products we recommend. We earn a small commission when you buy through them, at no extra cost to you. As an Amazon Associate we earn from qualifying purchases. See our ",["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/disclaimer","className":"text-orange-600 dark:text-orange-400 hover:underline","children":"disclaimer"}]," for details."]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose","children":[["$","h2","0",{"id":"what-is-the-pomodoro-technique","children":"What Is the Pomodoro Technique?"}],["$","p","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"In the late 1980s, Francesco Cirillo was a university student struggling to study. He picked up a kitchen timer shaped like a tomato — a <em>pomodoro</em> in Italian — and set it for 25 minutes. He committed to working on one thing until it rang. Then he took a 5-minute break. Then he did it again."}}],"$L9","$La","$Lb","$Lc","$Ld","$Le","$Lf","$L10","$L11","$L12","$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16","$L17","$L18","$L19","$L1a","$L1b","$L1c","$L1d","$L1e","$L1f","$L20","$L21","$L22"]}],"$L23","$L24","$L25"]}],"$L26"]}]]}]
7:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js","async":true}]
8:["$","$L27",null,{"children":["$","$28",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@29"}]}]
9:["$","p","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The system he formalised from this habit is now one of the most widely recommended productivity methods in the world:"}}]
a:["$","ul","3",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Work for 25 minutes (one \"pomodoro\")"}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Take a 5-minute break"}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"After four pomodoros, take a 25–30 minute break"}}],["$","li","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Repeat"}}]]}]
b:["$","p","4",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Simple. But does it actually work?"}}]
c:["$","h2","5",{"id":"what-the-research-says","children":"What the Research Says"}]
d:["$","p","6",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The science broadly supports the principle, even if the specific numbers are somewhat arbitrary."}}]
e:["$","p","7",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Research on cognitive performance consistently shows that <strong>sustained focus degrades over time</strong>. Attention is not a tap you can leave running indefinitely — it is a resource that depletes. Scheduled breaks, particularly those involving physical movement or mental disengagement, restore attentional capacity."}}]
f:["$","p","8",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A 2011 University of Illinois study found that brief mental breaks — even as short as a few seconds — help maintain focus during prolonged tasks. The Pomodoro technique formalises this into a system."}}]
10:["$","p","9",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The 25-minute interval specifically has less scientific backing than the general principle. It is a useful default, not a law of nature."}}]
11:["$","h2","10",{"id":"where-the-technique-fails","children":"Where the Technique Fails"}]
12:["$","p","11",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>For flow-state work</strong>, the timer is counterproductive. If you are a developer or designer who regularly enters deep flow states, being forced to stop at the 25-minute mark interrupts rather than supports your work."}}]
13:["$","p","12",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>For collaborative work</strong>, fixed intervals are difficult to manage around meetings, async communication, and the rhythms of team collaboration."}}]
14:["$","p","13",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>For highly variable tasks</strong>, the fixed-interval approach can feel mechanical and create a false sense of productivity (you completed eight pomodoros!) without actually measuring output."}}]
15:["$","h2","14",{"id":"adapting-it-to-your-work","children":"Adapting It to Your Work"}]
16:["$","p","15",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The rigid version of Pomodoro — 25/5, four intervals, long break — is a starting point, not a prescription. Consider:"}}]
17:["$","p","16",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Longer intervals for deep work</strong>: Many knowledge workers find 50/10 or 90/20 rhythms more aligned with their natural focus cycles. Experiment with what feels right before committing."}}]
18:["$","p","17",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Flexible stopping</strong>: If you are in flow when the timer rings, add another 5–10 minutes before stopping. The point is preventing <em>accidental</em> marathon sessions, not enforcing arbitrary cutoffs."}}]
19:["$","p","18",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Task-based rather than time-based</strong>: Instead of \"work for 25 minutes,\" try \"finish this function\" or \"write 300 words.\" Combine time pressure with output goals."}}]
1a:["$","h2","19",{"id":"the-underrated-value-of-the-break","children":"The Underrated Value of the Break"}]
1b:["$","p","20",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Most people using Pomodoro think the productive part is the work interval. The break is what most people skip or misuse."}}]
1c:["$","p","21",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"A proper break means <strong>genuine disengagement</strong>: stand up, walk to another room, look out a window, make a drink. Not scrolling your phone, not checking email, not reading articles. Your prefrontal cortex needs to idle."}}]
1d:["$","p","22",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The break is the feature. The timer is just the enforcement mechanism."}}]
1e:["$","h2","23",{"id":"best-tools","children":"Best Tools"}]
1f:["$","ul","24",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Physical timer</strong>: The original method. The tactile action of winding the timer creates psychological commitment."}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Flow (macOS)</strong>: Elegant Pomodoro timer with task tracking."}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Toggl Track</strong>: Combines time tracking with focus sessions."}}],["$","li","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Forest app</strong>: Gamified focus timer — plants a virtual tree during each session."}}]]}]
20:["$","h2","25",{"id":"should-you-try-it","children":"Should You Try It?"}]
21:["$","p","26",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Yes — with the expectation that you will adapt it. The core insight is valuable: <strong>time-box your work, schedule your rest, and treat both as non-negotiable</strong>."}}]
22:["$","p","27",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The specific 25/5 intervals may or may not suit you. The discipline of working in bounded sessions and taking real breaks almost certainly will."}}]
23:["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-10 pt-8 border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400","children":"Topic:"}],["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/blog?category=Productivity","className":"text-sm font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-green-50 text-green-700 hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity","children":"Productivity"}],[["$","$L3","pomodoro",{"href":"/blog/tag/pomodoro","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","pomodoro"]}],["$","$L3","time-management",{"href":"/blog/tag/time-management","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","time-management"]}],["$","$L3","focus",{"href":"/blog/tag/focus","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","focus"]}],["$","$L3","techniques",{"href":"/blog/tag/techniques","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","techniques"]}]]]}]
24:["$","$L2a",null,{"title":"The Pomodoro Technique: Does It Actually Work?","slug":"pomodoro-technique-does-it-work"}]
25:["$","div",null,{"className":"print:hidden","children":["$","$L2b",null,{}]}]
26:["$","aside",null,{"className":"space-y-5 print:hidden","children":[["$","$L2c",null,{"items":[{"id":"what-is-the-pomodoro-technique","text":"What Is the Pomodoro Technique?","level":2},{"id":"what-the-research-says","text":"What the Research Says","level":2},{"id":"where-the-technique-fails","text":"Where the Technique Fails","level":2},{"id":"adapting-it-to-your-work","text":"Adapting It to Your Work","level":2},{"id":"the-underrated-value-of-the-break","text":"The Underrated Value of the Break","level":2},{"id":"best-tools","text":"Best Tools","level":2},{"id":"should-you-try-it","text":"Should You Try It?","level":2}]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"bg-white dark:bg-stone-900 rounded-2xl p-6 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800","children":[["$","img",null,{"src":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1438761681033-6461ffad8d80?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","alt":"Sara Osei","className":"w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl object-cover object-top mb-4"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"font-bold text-lg text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-0.5","style":{"fontFamily":"'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif"},"children":"Sara Osei"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-sm text-orange-500 font-medium mb-3","children":"Productivity Researcher"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-sm text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400 leading-relaxed mb-4","children":"Studies how physical and digital environments affect focus and output. 2d:["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M7 7h10v10","key":"1tivn9"}],["path",{"d":"M7 17 17 7","key":"1vkiza"}]],"className":"lucide-arrow-up-right","size":14}]
